content.en:
Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body was finally cultivated by him to the consummation realm.

And at the moment when his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body broke through to the consummation realm, the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body began to merge with the Demon Hell Ultimate Body, fusing the Demon Hell Ultimate Body little by little.

I saw that Ye Tian's body began to turn into the most primitive ultimate rule particle, and then began to reorganize, and gradually recovered his body, but at this moment, he had completed the final transformation, and only one ultimate body remained, that is, the ultimate body of ten thousand laws.

At this moment, Ye Tiancai truly understood that after creating his own ultimate path, other ultimate ways and the ultimate body were all burdens, and there was not much benefit to his own strength.

Just by fusing with the ultimate body of the Demon Hell, his strength had already undergone a transformation, as if he had truly surpassed the level of the Eternal Level, and had reached the realm of Immortal Invincible.

This is not an exaggeration, but a fact. 25

Now, if he killed a certain Peerless Ultimate Realm Lord, he could definitely kill them easily.

This is the power of the Ultimate Way of Ten Thousand Laws and the Ultimate Body of Ten Thousand Laws!

However, he still did not go to the sixth layer, but continued to comprehend the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws, trying to continue to improve the realm of the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws.

The same is true of the other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, who all want to improve the Ultimate Rule Realm at the fifth layer, and are not in a hurry to go to the sixth layer.

After all, there are too many levels of the ultimate tower, there are thirty-six floors in total, and if you want to really pass through the thirty-six floors, it is not something that can be done in a short period of time, so you naturally have to maximize the benefits.

In this way, Ye Tian and several other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters had been comprehending the ultimate rules at the fifth layer.

It wasn't until a long time after the Ultimate Era that Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule had comprehended the three hundred and eleven realms, and he couldn't continue to comprehend it just by relying on the light here.

"Gotta leave!"

Ye Tian went to break through the level and wanted to enter the sixth layer.

......

In the level leading to the sixth floor.

Ye Tian saw the dense passage, this kind of assessment, he was still very familiar with, that is, from the correct channel.

He was not in a hurry to pass, but silently comprehended the aura contained in these passages, and found that these passages were all composed of ultimate rules, and if he chose wrongly, he might not die, but he would definitely be trapped for a long time.

Therefore, the difficulty of this level is still not small, and you must not choose the wrong one, otherwise, you will waste countless long years.

"Don't rush, take your time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was here silently contemplating, comprehending all the dense passages one by one, and analyzing the location at the end of the passage through the breath of the ultimate rules contained in these passages.

Gradually, these passages seemed to turn into coordinates, and Ye Tian drew a picture in his mind by combining these coordinates.

After a long time, the picture was finally completely painted.

"There are only three ways out in this picture, and the others are dead ends, and once you enter, you will enter the loop, and it is difficult to get out. Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he chose one of these three passages.

Swish!

Ye Tian walked over, then walked through the passage and came to the sixth floor of the Ultimate Tower.

......

The sixth floor of the Ultimate Tower.

This level has endless flames.

"The breath of this flame is somewhat familiar!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Doomsday Exalted!

This should be a flame that contains the supreme power of the end of the world, so it's called the flame of doom!

At this moment, when he came into contact with these flames of doom, his ultimate will seemed to be burning, and it was very painful.

But Ye Tian was very excited, because through the scorching of these doomsday flames, coupled with the secret method of the end, he could completely refine his ultimate will.

Thereupon.

It was here that he endured the scorching flames of doom, making the ultimate will stronger little by little.

Time passes.

Ye Tian gradually became familiar with the scorching of these doomsday flames, after a long time, the ultimate will was about to undergo the ninth transformation, once the ninth transformation was completed, his ultimate will would transform into the ultimate will.

He forgot time, forgot everything, and only remembered that he was refining the ultimate will.

Rumble!!!!!!

Ye Tian's ultimate will began to transform.

After a long time, the ultimate will continued to compress, like a black hole collapsing, and the infinite ultimate will was compressed into one point, which is the ultimate 880 points.

After that, wisps of ultimate will were condensed at the ultimate point.

Gradually, his ultimate will became more and more powerful, covering and fusing all of the ultimate will.

Rumble!!!!

The ultimate will is completely born.

At this moment, Ye Tian's strength increased again, reaching a realm that he could not even imagine.

"Breakthrough, the ultimate will has been cultivated, plus I have created the ultimate way of ten thousand laws, the ultimate body of ten thousand laws, maybe I already have the qualifications to impact the ultimate supreme!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he wouldn't be in such a hurry to impact the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, he still didn't know much about the realm of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule had not yet reached the three hundred and sixty-five realm, and had not yet reached the real limit, and there was still room for improvement.

Unless he has no room to improve in the future, he will venture to the realm of the Ultimate Extreme Being.

The Ultimate Will has been born, and the flames here are of little use to him.

So, Ye Tian prepared to go to the seventh layer.
